title: HajCraft
description: The beloved blåhaj has come to Minecraft
body:
HajCraft adds cute decorative shark blocks of 9 different colours and all of them have recipes so they can easily be obtained in survival.

If you're wondering what the recipes are, they use lots and lots of wool, and don't forget that these sharks have hearts of gold.

This mod was created using MCreator and Blockbench.
